mapper.select:
SELECT id, type, name, sort, status, create_time, update_time, create_user, update_user FROM category
AND name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')
AND type = #{type}
ORDER BY sort ASC, create_time DESC
mapper.update:
UPDATE category
type = #{type},
name = #{name},
sort = #{sort},
status = #{status},
update_time = #{updateTime}, update_user = #{updateUser}
WHERE id = #{id}
